Packages & Pricing

Pick the package that fits your body and your budget

Every package includes Tyler's full assessment, customized technique selection, and post-session guidance. Multi-session packages lock in savings and keep your progress on track.

Required for checkout — your receipt goes here

Single Session

$85

per 60-minute session

Try Tyler's work with no commitment. One full session, fully customized to your needs.

  • 60-minute massage
  • Full body assessment
  • Choice of modality
  • Post-session stretches
Best Value

3-Session Package

$225

$75/session — save $30

Build momentum with three sessions. Tyler tracks your progress and adjusts each visit.

  • Three 60-minute sessions
  • Progress tracking between visits
  • Priority scheduling
  • Custom home care plan
  • Save $30 vs. single rate

6-Session Package

$420

$70/session — save $90

The serious commitment. Six sessions for deep, lasting change in chronic pain or mobility.

  • Six 60-minute sessions
  • Detailed progress notes
  • Priority scheduling
  • Custom home care plan
  • Save $90 vs. single rate

How it works

Choose your package and complete checkout. Tyler will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your first session. Multi-session packages are valid for 6 months from purchase — no rush, but enough structure to keep you on track.

What's included in every session

A pre-session check-in, 60 minutes of hands-on work tailored to your body that day, and post-session guidance (stretches, posture tips, movement homework). Tyler adjusts his approach every visit based on how you're responding.

Tyler Smith Massage
